case_title: W WONG CONSTRUCTION CO INC VS PODESTA & BALDOCCHI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,525.00 FILED BY W WONG CONSTRUCTION CO INC AS TO DEFENDANT PODESTA & BALDOCCHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-06-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF JAN-03-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
RETURN RECEIPT TO BALDOCHI PODESTA RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF W WONG CONSTRUCTION CO INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PODESTA & BALDOCCHI $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $157.70 INTEREST, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,170.70, INTEREST AT 10% FROM JULY 1, 1991. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
